enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Nee Oru Pattam'?

The song conveys themes of love and longing, reflecting on the emotional connection between two individuals.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Rojavai Killathe'?

The movie explores romantic relationships and the challenges faced by the characters, making the song a poignant reflection of their journey.

Who are the singers of 'Nee Oru Pattam'?

The song features the melodious voices of K.S. Chitra and S.P. Balasubramaniam.

When was 'Nee Oru Pattam' released?

The song was released on December 3, 1993.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the song Nee Oru Pattam from the movie Rojavai Killathe, the lyrics express deep emotions of love and nostalgia. The duet by K.S. Chitra and S.P. Balasubramaniam beautifully encapsulates the essence of romantic longing. As the characters reflect on their relationship, the melody evokes a sense of yearning and connection. This timeless piece resonates with anyone who has experienced the complexities of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nee Oru Pattam from Rojavai Killathe is a timeless melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Featuring the enchanting voices of K.S. Chitra and S.P. Balasubramaniam, this song resonates with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet moments of romance. The collaboration of these legendary artists with Deva's soulful composition makes this track a must-listen for fans of classic Tamil music.
stanzaMeanings: You are a flag, I am a flag, you are a flag; we have come together through our journey.
Where are we going, what is our life, what is our life, where are we going? We have thought of both as one.
Until we can fly, let go of old thoughts; we have accepted this ending and agreed to the time together.
Where are we going, what is our life, what is our life, where are we going? We have thought of both as one.
We don't need goals, we don't need fear, we don't need tears.
If both hands become wings, we don't need night or dawn.
We will slowly open the flowers and gently touch the earth.
We will slowly finish the story and also write poetry.
Where are we going, what is our life, what is our life, where are we going? We have thought of both as one.
We need happiness, we need joy, we need the song that both will sing.
When you sleep, the world should not be silent.
Life should have a little excitement, life should be enjoyed slowly.
Yesterday and tomorrow should be forgotten; we should only live in this moment.
Where are we going, what is our life, what is our life, where are we going? We have thought of both as one.
Until we can fly, let go of old thoughts; we have accepted this ending and agreed to the time together.
